_comment: Fast per-PR mutation lane over the small, pure faithfulness counter, so a full run is quick enough to gate every PR (the broad route/ascii lanes stay nightly). Gates via thresholds.break.
thresholds_comment: Mutates the structural-count counter (countStructuralElements + faithfulnessWarning + isDrop). The few survivors are equivalent mutants on the opaque/default null-returning branches (see docs/mutation-testing.md §incremental). Regenerate to confirm the score; break=90 fails any real regression.
